title: erodium microphyllum
intro: Erodium microphyllum, also known as the small-leaf heron's bill or small heronsbill, is a flowering plant species in the geranium family (Geraniaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erodium microphyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
